name: Variant B: Plan-and-Solve v2 with final_confidence
short_description: Plan-and-Solve v2 agent emitting a final_confidence in [0,1] alongside final_answer, evaluated on the same paired N=147 manifest.
model_description: claude-sonnet-4-6 via Anthropic API (CLI transport). max_turns=10, max_tokens=4096.
prediction_schema: Each line is a JSON object with fields: instance_id (str), subset (str), variant (str), final_answer (str|null), final_confidence (float|null), cost_usd (float), trajectory_path (str|null), judge_sonnet_success (bool), judge_sonnet_rationale (str), judge_opus_success (bool|null), judge_opus_rationale (str|null).

files.description: Per-instance predictions for variant b on the paired N=147 manifest (SWE+Tau+FS) with sonnet and opus judge verdicts attached.
